mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchases(product_id, quantity, purchase_date) VALUES(#{productId}, #{quantity}, #{orderDate})
mapper.select: SELECT pc.id as id ,cg.name as categoryName ,pd.name as productName ,pd.price as price ,pc.quantity as quantity ,pc.purchase_date as purchaseDate FROM purchases pc LEFT JOIN products pd ON pc.product_id = pd.id LEFT JOIN categories cg ON pd.category_id = cg.id

SELECT pc.id as id ,cg.name as categoryName ,pd.name as productName ,pd.price as price ,pc.quantity as quantity ,pc.purchase_date as purchaseDate FROM purchases pc LEFT JOIN products pd ON pc.product_id = pd.id LEFT JOIN categories cg ON pd.category_id = cg.id WHERE EXTRACT (YEAR FROM pc.purchase_date) = #{year} AND EXTRACT (MONTH FROM pc.purchase_date) = #{month} ORDER BY pc.purchase_date ASC
